caption: A man is seen recording a podcast in a room decorated with framed photographs and a "LEE" sign. He wears a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, tan suspenders, glasses, and headphones, topped with a tall, grey, spiky wig. He is positioned in front of a black microphone. Overlaid on the scene are logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. In the first frame, he has his mouth open and his right hand slightly raised. As the frames progress, he continues talking, shifting his facial expressions and tilting his head slightly. His right arm moves further across his body toward the end of the sequence. The background and equipment remain static while the man's movements and expressions evolve as he speaks into the microphone.
